parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
parser.add_argument('--headless', action='store_true', help='Run headless NPU validation without launching the web UI')
parser.add_argument('--model_path', type=str, default='ckpt/')
args = parser.parse_args()

# Auto-fallback: if checkpoint directory is missing, force headless mode
if not os.path.isdir(args.model_path):
    print(f'Warning: Model path "{args.model_path}" not found. Running headless validation.')
    args.headless = True

if args.headless:
    # Headless NPU validation block
    print(f'NPU devices available: {torch_npu.npu.device_count()}')
    x = torch.randn(2, 3).npu()
    print(f'NPU tensor creation OK: shape={x.shape}')
    # Validate core project imports
    from mimo_qwen2_grouped import *
    from Codec.models.codec import Generator as SpeechGPT2Tokenizer
    print('All core imports validated successfully.')
    sys.exit(0)

# Only reached if headless=False AND checkpoint exists
demo = gr.Blocks()
# ... UI component construction ...
demo.launch()
